title: Amtech A3563 Safety glasses with clear lenses
features: COMFORTABLE: These safety glasses have clear lenses and are comfortable and lightweight with folding arms
SAFE: They provide protection from eye injuries when undertaking hazardous DIY jobs
COMPLIANT: The goggles are certified under PPE Regulations to EN166:2001 Optical Class 1
ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP GRIP: For comfort and control during use.
COMPACT DESIGN: Versatile tool for carpentry, assembly, and general household repairs.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Safety Glasses See more
